subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! At every moment from the hidden realm there cometh the Call of "Am I not?", and unto His faithful friends a chalice of tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهآء هر دم از جهان پنهان خطاب الست را بلی‌ئی و یاران مخلصین را جام بلائی عاشقان بها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
